zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Purrett於1521年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾米費爾德。她於1542年與Edward Thomas Foxe在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾米費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1582年1月9日在英國英格蘭越可爾 韋斯特 利丁享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾米費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Purrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Parrott
meanings: English: from a short form of the Middle English personal name Peres, Peris (from Old French Pierre; see Pearce ) + the diminutive suffixes -et, -ot.
English: habitational name from North Perrott in Somerset or South Perrott in Dorset (both named from the River Parret on which they stand, the etymology of which name is uncertain).
Altered form of French Parrot or of its variant Parot or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Purrett was born in 1521, in Mirfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Edward Thomas Foxe in 1542, in Mirfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 9 January 1582, in Yorkshire West Riding, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Mirfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Purrett est née en 1521, à Mirfield, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Edward Thomas Foxe en 1542, à Mirfield, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1582, à Yorkshire West Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Mirfield, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Purrettは1521年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアミルフィールドで生まれた。1542年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアミルフィールドでEdward Thomas Foxeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1582年1月9日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア ウエスト リディングで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアミルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Purrett(은)는 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 미르필드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1542년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 미르필드에서 Edward Thomas Foxe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 1월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨스트 리딩에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 미르필드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Purrett родилась в 1521 г. в местности мирфиелд, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Thomas Foxe в 1542 г. в местности мирфиелд, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 9 января 1582 г. в местности еркшир вест ридинг, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности мирфиелд, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
